name: cc-skill-codex-marketplace
description: Dual-direction peer-agent skills: Claude Code invokes Codex CLI (cc-skill-codex) and Codex CLI invokes Claude Code (codex-skill-claude). Flagship use case: adversarial / steerable code review.

plugins.name: cc-skill-codex
plugins.description: For Claude Code: invoke Codex CLI as a peer coding agent — adversarial code review, design analysis, debugging, delegated tasks.

plugins.name: codex-skill-claude
plugins.description: For Codex CLI: invoke Claude Code as a peer coding agent — adversarial code review, design analysis, debugging, delegated tasks.
